title: Design for a Better World with Don Norman
description: Learn how to use humanity-centered design and Design Thinking to solve complex global challenges such as climate change, inequality, and waste. This course teaches systems thinking, ethics, and practical methods to create sustainable solutions, mobilize people toward change, and design meaningful impact with the help of AI and circular design principles.

chapters.title: The World Is Artificial and the Way We Measure It Is Wrong

lessons.title: Welcome to Design for a Better World
What Can Designers Do to Make the World Better?
Anything Artificial We Can Design Better
Use More Meaningful Measurements in Design and in the World

chapters.title: How to Design For Sustainability and the Circular Economy

lessons.title: Recycling is Not Enough. Let's Design for Reuse
Design Products That Are Sustainable, Robust and Resilient
Use Circular Design to Reverse Harm
